title: Spruce Willis the Xmas Tree
description: Bruce has evolved into Spruce Willis the Christmas Tree!
body:
# Spruce Willis the Xmas Tree
[![Discord Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-16181C?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=5865F2)](https://discord.tophatcat.dev)
[![CurseForge Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/CurseForge-16181C?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&logoColor=FF784D)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/spruce-willis-the-xmas-tree)
[![Modrinth Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-16181C?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=17B85A)](https://modrinth.com/mod/spruce-willis-the-xmas-tree)
[![Bluesky Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Bluesky-16181C?style=for-the-badge&logo=bluesky&logoColor=1185FE)](https://bsky.app/profile/tophatcat.dev)
[![Github Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/GitHub-16181C?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&logoColor=BBDDE5)](https://github.com/kiris-mods/spruce-willis-the-xmas-tree)
[![Website Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/tophatcat.dev-16181C?style=for-the-badge&logo=&logoColor=57Z29S)](https://tophatcat.dev/mods/spruce-willis-the-xmas-tree)

Bruce has evolved into Spruce Willis the Christmas Tree!  
A small mod created during WinterJam 2019!

It's that time of year again, we need a new Christmas tree for the presents to go under! So lets go see if we can catch one wandering around in the forest!
Grandfather Willis is, shockingly summoned when bone-meal is used on Spruce Willis, or naturally when lightning strikes it.

![Image showcasing Spruce Willis and Grandfather Willis The Xmas Tree](https://tophatcat.dev/mods/spruce-willis-the-xmas-tree/spruce-and-grandfather-willis.png)

![Image showcasing Spruce Willis and Grandfather Willis The Xmas Tree](https://tophatcat.dev/mods/spruce-willis-the-xmas-tree/spruce-and-grandfather-willis-2.png)
